title: Ashoka's visit to the Ramagrama stupa Sanchi Stupa 1 Southern gateway
description: Ashoka riding a chariot in a relief from the Sanchi Stupa, Madhya Pradesh, India. Detail from the Southern gateway of Stupa 1 at Sanchi.
